detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (FXT.sol#569-603):
	External calls:
	- require(bool)(TokenController(controller).onApprove(msg.sender,_spender,_amount)) (FXT.sol#591)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _amount (FXT.sol#597)
	MiniMeToken.allowed (FXT.sol#283) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MiniMeToken.allowance(address,address) (FXT.sol#617-623)
	- MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (FXT.sol#569-603)
	- MiniMeToken.transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (FXT.sol#419-451)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256)](FXT.sol#L569-L603):
	External calls:
	- [require(bool)(TokenController(controller).onApprove(msg.sender,_spender,_amount))](FXT.sol#L591)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _amount](FXT.sol#L597)
	[MiniMeToken.allowed](FXT.sol#L283) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [MiniMeToken.allowance(address,address)](FXT.sol#L617-L623)
	- [MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256)](FXT.sol#L569-L603)
	- [MiniMeToken.transferFrom(address,address,uint256)](FXT.sol#L419-L451)

detectors.description:
Controlled.changeController(address) (FXT.sol#129-133) should emit an event for: 
	- controller = _newController (FXT.sol#131)

MiniMeToken.totalSupplyAt(uint256) (FXT.sol#751-789) has external calls inside a loop: parentToken.totalSupplyAt(min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (FXT.sol#771)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		FXT.generateTokensByList(address[],uint256[])
		FXT.generateTokens(address,uint256)
		MiniMeToken.generateTokens(address,uint256)
		MiniMeToken.totalSupply()

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.createCloneToken(string,uint8,string,uint256,bool) (FXT.sol#821-865):

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.generateTokens(address,uint256) (FXT.sol#885-905):
	External calls:
	- curTotalSupply = totalSupply() (FXT.sol#889)
		- parentToken.totalSupplyAt(min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (FXT.sol#771)
	- previousBalanceTo = balanceOf(_owner) (FXT.sol#893)

	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(0,_owner,_amount) (FXT.sol#901)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.doTransfer(address,address,uint256) (FXT.sol#467-541):
	External calls:
	- previousBalanceFrom = balanceOfAt(_from,block.number) (FXT.sol#497)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (FXT.sol#721)
	- require(bool)(TokenController(controller).onTransfer(_from,_to,_amount)) (FXT.sol#509)
	- previousBalanceTo = balanceOfAt(_to,block.number) (FXT.sol#527)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (FXT.sol#721)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(_from,_to,_amount) (FXT.sol#537)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.18 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.18 (FXT.sol#1)
